name: 3D Hero Scene
description: WebGL hero section with wireframe icosahedron that deforms and follows cursor, floating particles, and star field background.
accessibility_notes: decorative only — no semantic content in 3D scene
conflicts: heavy WebGL — no props to tune; performance on low-end mobile devices is poor
hardcoded colors and sizes — not configurable without editing source
usage_tip: Best for landing page hero; avoid on pages with heavy content below.
